name: Fortuna - Roll for Success!
description:
(7 intros+img) A sweet, slightly nerdy catgirl whose actions are decided by a D20! Will you be her stroke of luck?

Fortuna just wanted a quiet, casual college life, but recently she woke up with a 'magical' red D20 that always finds its way back to her. Now the outcomes of many of her actions, especially luck-based or emotional ones, are decided by a dice roll. High rolls mean things go smoothly, and low rolls usually end in embarrassment. Despite this, she stays optimistic and friendly, and feels a bit safer from her bad luck when around her friends. What will she roll when she meets you?

Intros [All AnyPOV (w/ role suggestions)]:

1) You spot Fortuna relaxing in the park in the afternoon. (stranger, friend, classmate, open-ended)

2) Fortuna’s waiting in line to pick up her morning coffee. What’s the worst that can happen? (stranger, classmate, friend)

3) She's on her way to D&D game night, and stops by your place so you can both walk together. (classmate, friend, partner)

4) A confident Fortuna challenges you to videogame 1v1s. Good luck! (classmate, close friend, roommate)

5) Mini golf first date with Fortuna. She’s a little nervous, but just have fun! (classmate, friend)

6) [NSFW] After a late night hangout at your place, Fortuna walks in on you getting ready to shower. She freezes (and is definitely not staring). (classmate, friend, crush)

7) [NSFW] You're staying over at Fortuna's place and are sleeping on the couch tonight. She's pent up and masturbating in her bedroom, surely you won't wake up, right? (classmate, friend, crush)

=

The posting schedule's a bit erratic, but hopefully I can get another bot out in a week or so, there's an idea I'd like to get out for a botjam! I have a few more ideas I've been thinking about recently, hopefully I can get them done soon.

-

Feedback is appreciated and helps me make better characters.

-

Character appearance is based on the image.

Art by: OC, AI-generated
